text:
$ LANG=en LC_ALL=C svn commit -F /usr/ports.svn/security/svn-commit.tmp
Sending        Makefile
Sending        distinfo
Transmitting file data ..done
Committing transaction...
svn: E000030: Commit failed (details follow):
svn: E000030: Can't open file '/s/svn/ports/db/txn-current-lock': Read-only file system
